title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: get up and running with Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python SDK for Ollama. Chat with local models, embed documents, generate images.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript SDK for Ollama. Works in Node, Deno, Bun and browsers.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration to use any Ollama model as an LLM or embeddings provider.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (ChatGPT-style). Models manager, RAG, multi-user, dark mode.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Interactive CLI wrapper around Ollama with shell completions and prompt history.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that turns any Ollama model into a GitHub Copilot replacement.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal RAG pipeline using Ollama embeddings + Chroma to chat with your documents.

title: ollama-agents
summary: Lightweight agent framework built on Ollama for tool-use & multi-step reasoning.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack 2.0 integration to use Ollama models as generators or embedders in pipelines.

title: ollama-n8n-node
summary: n8n community node to call Ollama models inside no-code workflows.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: .NET client for Ollama with async streaming and strongly-typed chat requests.

title: ollama-rs
summary: Rust crate providing async wrappers for the Ollama REST API.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU support and model preload.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Zero-dependency Rust bindings that embed Ollama via C FFI for offline inference.

title: ollama-go
summary: Official Go client library for Ollama with generated REST types.

title: ollama-docker-compose
summary: Production-ready Docker Compose stack bundling Ollama, WebUI, and GPU support.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin that adds an Ollama chat pane and note-completion commands.

title: ollama-slack-bot
summary: Slack bot server that answers channel mentions using any Ollama model.

title: ollama-django
summary: Django app + REST API to expose Ollama models with user quotas and rate limits.
